author: joshd4078
content: Because many of you indicated that you already had a pretty good idea of what you are planning to work on, I've started this thread early so that you can signal your project so that others that are interested in the same can start to coordinate.

author: krisoshea.eth
content: Hi there, I’m Kris, delighted to have been selected to participate in cohort 7 of the fellowship! The Reth partial statefulness project really caught my eye early on, ive been following the Reth project for a really long time and this looks like a great opportunity to contribute something meaningful to it. I’ve been researching it for the past few weeks, I’ll share my week 0 update below. So far, it seems like a pretty large research task, I imagine it will take up until the project proposal deadline to really understand the problem deeply and to put together a very well fleshed out project scope. I’m working on my week 1 update at the moment. I’m very excited to work seriously on this project!

author: lqzic
content:
I'm interested in building an in-protocol builder (EIP 7732) on Lodestar, as per their proposed project here:
https://github.com/eth-protocol-fellows/cohort-seven/blob/main/projects/project-ideas.md#lodestar-eip-7732-builder
This caught my eye as I would really like to work on an infrastructure piece that would be used going forward - and I already have some context on it (and Gloas in general) that I got through working on various PRs on Lodestar.
I also like how well-scoped it is.
